priorities.goal: Resolve workbook sheet/group/unit price directly from code and system with less manual glue.
priorities.value: Removes one of the biggest manual steps in quote execution.

priorities.goal: Bridge image extraction outputs into structured input JSON for the engine automatically.
priorities.value: Connects handwriting/image path to operator path more cleanly.

priorities.goal: Allow engine entry to return send-ready output shape for Telegram delivery more directly.
priorities.value: Reduces last-mile manual glue in chat delivery.

priorities.goal: Move closer to one-command execution from raw chat input to final rendered quote.
priorities.value: Improves speed and consistency for repetitive quote requests.

priorities.goal: Add reusable quote fixtures/tests for common cases: single-line, multi-line, height<1m, handwriting-confirmed path.
priorities.value: Makes upgrades safer and reduces silent regressions.
